about.title: About | Logos
about.description: Logos is on a mission to revitalise Civil Society. A community of builders, activists, and change seekers contributing in a wide variety of ways.
about.heading: Logos is on a mission to revitalise Civil Society.

hero.title: Logos is on a mission to revitalise Civil Society.

community.eyebrow: A global community committed to driving change
community.body: We are a community of builders, activists, and change seekers who contribute in a wide variety of ways.

initiative.caption: Our initiatives connect local action with sovereign technology.

whoWeAre.title: Who We Are
whoWeAre.useCase1Body: Build a bank powered by logic you've programmedd
whoWeAre.useCase2Body: Create tokens that you can transfer and use across applications
whoWeAre.useCase3Body: Use familiar tooling to interact with Logos modules and applications
whoWeAre.useCase4Body: Re-imagine existing services as decentralised, open applications
whoWeAre.historyBody: Logos was created to give people the tools to live soverign lives.
whoWeAre.principlesBody: Our mission is to empower individuals to achieve their aspirations and create a better future for all.  Where freedom, liberty, and human sovereignty are protected, and censorship resistance is ensured.
whoWeAre.howWeWorkBody: We build decentralised technology and inspire change. We work with local communities to use our technology to build the tools they need.

ourWork.title: Our Work
ourWork.body: We build the tools for people to create what they need. We create the underlying technology. People all over the world have created amazing applications specific to their needs.
ourWork.cardBody:
Local communities are using Logos-aligned tools to coordinate around practical needs, from neighbourhood organising to digital rights.

These case studies show how civic action and resilient technology can reinforce each other.

Each example starts with a concrete problem and a small group of people willing to build a better path.

workWithUs.title: Work With Us | Logos
workWithUs.description: Open roles and ways to collaborate with the Logos team.
workWithUs.heading: Work With Us

connect.title: Let's Connect | Logos
connect.description: Be part of what's unfolding. Receive updates on progress, gatherings and opportunities to contribute.
connect.heading: Let's Connect.
